note: Tiered dark-mode visual-test manifest for tools/dm-driver/dm-check.sh. The `check` tier renders each target in ENGINE mode at the default darkness (bgLightness 16) and asserts the result lands in the dark band. The `deep` tier sweeps modes x bgLightness x window sizes (axes below) over the same targets. Schema documented in README.md.

defaults._comment_assert: meanLumMax: full-screenshot mean grey luminance (0..1) must be <= this. bgHex/bgTolerance: the sampled background pixel (at bgSampleXY) must be within bgTolerance (0..1 per-channel) of bgHex. Omit bg* to skip the pixel assert (real sites have non-uniform backgrounds).
